_meta.notes: UMR routes through different networks. Via Sierra/HPN = ultra-lenient (95806, 2 units). Via UHC = UHC guidelines (G0399). Check portal redirect to determine routing. v1.1: HST code set to 95806 default, network_routing and hst_code_overrides added for Sierra vs UHC paths.

uhc_network.reason: UMR plans routed through UHC network use G0399 and UHC criteria via Evicore. Minority of UMR plans.

network_routing._description: UMR routes through Sierra (majority) or UHC (minority). Network determines: HST code, criteria, portal, and auth workflow.
network_routing.detection_method: Portal redirect on Sierra portal indicates network. If redirect to UHC = UHC network.

sierra_network.notes: Majority of UMR plans. Auto-approved HST, lenient PSG criteria.

uhc_network.notes: Minority of UMR plans. UHC criteria apply. Submit via Evicore.

submission.notes: Depends on network routing. Sierra network: provider.healthplanofnevada.com. UHC network: uhcprovider.com.

special_rules.description: UMR routes through Sierra OR UHC depending on plan
If eligibility shows (UM Only), auth through Sierra but benefits through provider.umr.com
special_rules.action: Find UMR member ID for benefits

flags.message: Check which network UMR routes through (Sierra vs UHC) -- determines criteria, HST code, and portal
